ref: You are a bunch of evil snakes, so how can you say anything good? Your words show what is in your hearts.
text: Mi ma lonyanyarД© lЙӣ maЙЈЙӣ! Nda miabara fiЙӣ miawo ara sЙӣЙӣ Й”ЙЈЙӣ gЙ” miЙ–e maturi lalaa? AlasЙ” nnЙӣ loyi Й”turi Й”tu ame i kanya sЙӣ kaЙЈЙӣ.

ref: Someone may say, вҖңHere is the Messiah!вҖқ or вҖңThere he is!вҖқ But don't believe it.
